subcodes.first_line: O thou who art kindled and set ablaze in the fire ignited from the divine Lote-Tree, may God shower upon thee the clouds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اشتعل و احترق فی النار الموقده من السدره الربانیه افاض الله علیک غمام
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @martyrs and martyrdom, @firmness in the Covenant
